parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  source: $json.source,
  source_id: $json.source_id,
  google_place_id: $json.google_place_id,
  email: $json.email || null,
  email_verified: false,
  email_source: $json.email_source || null,
  phone: $json.phone || null,
  website: $json.website || null,
  address: $json.address || null,
  city: $json.city || 'Dakar',
  score: $json.score,
  score_details: $json.score_details,
  listings_count: $json.listings_count || 0,
  status: 'qualified'
}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'emailed_j0', j0_sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_emailed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'emailed_j3', j3_sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_emailed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'emailed_j7', j7_sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_emailed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  company_name: $json.company_name,
  source: $json.source,
  source_id: $json.source_id,
  google_place_id: $json.google_place_id,
  phone: $json.phone || null,
  website: $json.website || null,
  city: $json.city || 'Dakar',
  score: $json.score,
  score_details: $json.score_details,
  status: 'disqualified'
}) }}

meta.description: Version 100% gratuite — Google Maps + scraping email site web + Resend. Sans Apollo ni Hunter.
